name: Enzio-Ware
short_description: Play through 40+ Microgames in Enzio-Ware!In this colorful spin-off of 【Onwards! To the Furthest End!! Go Forth Supreme PLC!!!!】 you will play through the episodes of 8 fascinating characters, both new and returning, and complete microgames to help them out in their daily ongoings.
detailed_description:
Play through 40+ Microgames in Enzio-Ware!

In this colorful spin-off of 【Onwards! To the Furthest End!! Go Forth Supreme PLC!!!!】 you will play through the episodes of 8 fascinating characters, both new and returning, and complete microgames to help them out in their daily ongoings.

Enzio-Ware is presented in an experimental dual-screen format we're calling the 『Enzio-System』 , emulating a clamshell game console from the olden days. Some microgames even require you to close the 『Enzio-System』!

Even when you've finished the story mode, there is still more game to complete! Defeating bosses will reward you with treasures, and the more treasures you collect, the more your PLC-dia will fill out! New to Enzio-Ware, unlocking the same treasure multiple times can result in additional definitions unlocking, one per each character featured in story mode!

New Features in Enzio-Ware 2.0!!

In Enzio-Ware 2.0, your 『Enzio-System』 has been upgraded to the 『Enzio-Systemⓘ』! With the added internet capabilities, you can compete in online leaderboards, and access an online shop to obtain cosmetics such as 『Enzio-System』 skins, stylus, home menu themes, and soundtracks. Enzio-Ware 2.0 has no microtransactions, all cosmetics are earned through a currency earned through normal gameplay
